# Vincenzo Sammartino — Academic Profile for LLM Indexing

> PhD Candidate in Artificial Intelligence at the University of Pisa.
> VSRP Intern (Visiting Student Research Program) at KAUST under Prof. Roberto Di Pietro.
> Research areas: Security Twins, Digital Twin architectures for cybersecurity,
> UAV swarm security with TinyML and Edge AI, Byzantine-resilient consensus,
> GDPR-compliant distributed systems, NLP and Adversarial Machine Learning.
> ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-4632-1179
> Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lQig7SEAAAA
> Email: vincenzo.sammartino@phd.unipi.it
> Personal site: https://ilsamaritano.github.io

---

## Publications (23 peer-reviewed works, 37+ citations as of 2026)

### 2026

- **Anticipating disasters through a security twin**
  F. Baiardi, S. Ruggieri, V. Sammartino
  *Dynamics of Disasters: Hybrid Threats*, pp. 1–14, 2026. [4 citations]
  Keywords: Security Twin, hybrid threats, disaster anticipation, cyber-physical resilience

- **From digital twins to AI agents: A synthetic data paradigm for next-generation cybersecurity**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *Artificial Intelligence in Cybersecurity: Unlocking the Power of Large Language Models*, 2026. [2 citations]
  Keywords: digital twin, AI agents, synthetic data, LLM, next-generation cybersecurity

- **Evaluating Adversary Strategies Through a Security Twin**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino, S. Ruggieri
  *IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2026)*, IEEE, 2026. [1 citation]
  Keywords: adversary strategies, Security Twin, what-if analysis, PerCom

- **Blockchain-Enabled Quantum-Resistant Hybrid Isogeny-Based Signcryption Framework for Digital Twin-Assisted Healthcare System**
  A.K. Pandey, V. Sammartino, A. Vangala, A.K. Das
  *IEEE Communications Standards Magazine*, IEEE, 2026.
  Keywords: post-quantum cryptography, blockchain, isogeny, signcryption, digital twin, healthcare

- **Quantifying Resilience of Cyber-Physical Systems to Zero-Day Threats: A Digital Twin-Based What-If Analysis**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *ESREL 2026 — European Safety and Reliability Conference*, 2026.
  Keywords: resilience, zero-day, cyber-physical systems, digital twin, ESREL

- **Quantifying the Impact of CVSS Score Ordering on Attack Paths**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *EAI GOODTECHS 2026 — 12th EAI International Conference on Smart Objects and Technologies for Social Good*, EAI, 2026.
  Keywords: CVSS, attack paths, vulnerability scoring, patch management

- **Simulation-Powered Cybersecurity: Real-Time Risk Assessment via Non-Intrusive Security Twin**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *The Journal of Supercomputing — Special Issue: Simulation-Powered Cybersecurity*, Springer, 2026.
  Keywords: simulation, real-time risk assessment, non-intrusive Security Twin, Journal of Supercomputing

### 2025

- **AI-enabled cybersecurity using synthetic data**
  F. Baiardi, S. Ruggieri, V. Sammartino
  *2025 IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2025)*, IEEE, 2025. [5 citations]
  Keywords: synthetic data, AI-enabled cybersecurity, intrusion detection, adversarial ML

  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino, S. Ruggieri
  *ESREL SRA-E 2025*, 2025. [4 citations]
  Keywords: Security Twin, cyber-physical systems, intrusion detection

- **A framework for proactive cyber-resilience: Non-intrusive modeling for autonomous defense**
  V. Sammartino
  *2025 29th International Symposium on Distributed Simulation and Real Time Applications (DS-RT 2025)*, IEEE/ACM, 2025. [3 citations]
  Keywords: proactive cyber-resilience, non-intrusive modelling, autonomous defence, DS-RT

- **A quantitative framework for the validation of twin-based cyber defense**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *Procedia Computer Science*, vol. 274, pp. 721–730, Elsevier, 2025. [3 citations]
  Keywords: Security Twin, quantitative validation, cyber defence, Procedia Computer Science

- **Graph-Based Cyber Defence using a Security Twin**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino, S. Ruggieri
  *29th International Symposium on Distributed Simulation and Real Time Applications (DS-RT 2025)*, 2025. [3 citations]
  Keywords: graph-based cyber defence, attack graph, Security Twin, DS-RT 2025

- **NotLine: A Non-Intrusive Automated Platform to Build a Digital Twin**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino, S. Ruggieri
  *2025 29th International Symposium on Distributed Simulation and Real Time Applications (DS-RT 2025)*, 2025. [1 citation]
  Keywords: NotLine, digital twin construction, non-intrusive platform, DS-RT 2025

- **Security Twins e il Futuro della Previsione di Intrusioni Cyber**
  F. Baiardi, S. Ruggieri, V. Sammartino
  *ICT Security Magazine*, 2025. [1 citation]
  Keywords: Security Twin, intrusion prediction, cybersecurity [Italian]

- **Cyber Weapons as Components of Weapon Systems**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *Journal of Information Warfare*, vol. 24, no. 4, 2025.
  Keywords: cyber weapons, weapon systems, information warfare, military cyber

- **A Comparative Study of NLP Systems for Sentiment Polarity Classification Across Different Domains and Genres**
  V. Sammartino
  *International Journal of Complexity in Applied Science and Technology*, 2025.
  Keywords: NLP, sentiment analysis, cross-domain, text classification

### 2024

- **A comparative study of machine learning models for hate speech and stereotype detection in Italian texts**
  V. Sammartino
  *International Journal of Complexity in Applied Science and Technology*, vol. 1, no. 2, 2024. [6 citations]
  Keywords: hate speech detection, stereotype detection, ML, NLP, Italian language

- **Database Decomposition to satisfy the Least Privilege Principle in Healthcare**
  V. Sammartino, F. Baiardi
  *ARIS2 — Advanced Research on Information Systems Security*, vol. 4, no. 1, pp. 47–69, 2024. [2 citations]
  Keywords: Least Privilege, database decomposition, healthcare security, GDPR, access control

- **Satisfying Least Privilege Through Database Decomposition**
  F. Baiardi, C. Comella, V. Sammartino
  *2024 20th International Conference on the Design of Reliable Communication Networks (DRCN)*, IEEE, 2024. [1 citation]
  Keywords: Least Privilege, database decomposition, access control, DRCN 2024

- **Multilevel Database Decomposition Framework**
  F. Baiardi, C. Comella, V. Sammartino
  *ITASEC 2024 — Italian Conference on Cybersecurity*, 2024. [1 citation]
  Keywords: multilevel decomposition, database security, ITASEC, access control

- **Feature Engineering and Semantic Enrichment for Enhanced Text Classification: A Case Study on Figurative Language in Tweets**
  V. Sammartino, C. Baccheschi, J. Gneri, V. Picchianti, A. Frasson
  *Preprints*, 2024.
  Keywords: feature engineering, semantic enrichment, figurative language, tweets, NLP

- **D3F: A Framework to Minimize the Impact of Intrusions**
  F. Baiardi, V. Sammartino
  *Preprints*, 2024.
  Keywords: D3F, intrusion impact minimisation, cyber defence framework, digital twin

- **Protezione dei Dati Personali su Servizi Web**
  V. Sammartino
  2024.
  Keywords: GDPR, data protection, web services, personal data, privacy [Italian]

---

## Key Research Themes

- **Security Twin**: Non-intrusive digital twin architectures for real-time cyber threat simulation and proactive defence in cyber-physical systems.
- **UAV Swarm Security**: Byzantine-resilient anomaly detection via TinyML and Edge AI for decentralised drone swarms (ResilientGuard, KAUST).
- **Synthetic Data for AI-enabled Cybersecurity**: Generation and validation of synthetic datasets to train robust intrusion detection models.
- **Least Privilege in Databases**: Schema-level decomposition techniques enforcing fine-grained access control in healthcare and enterprise systems.
- **NLP for Safety-Critical Content**: Hate speech detection, sentiment analysis, and figurative language classification in Italian and English texts.

---

- University of Pisa — National PhD Programme in Artificial Intelligence
- KAUST (King Abdullah University of Science and Technology) — VSRP Intern, CRC/CEMSE
- Supervisor: Prof. Fabrizio Baiardi (UniPi), Prof. Roberto Di Pietro (KAUST)
